visuals.title: Demand Paging Overview
visuals.description: Animated diagram showing demand paging concept, page fault handling steps, page table entries with valid bits, effective access time calculation, and key benefits
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="400" data-topic-id="demand-paging">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bgGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E8EAF6"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#C5CAE9"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="400" fill="url(#bgGrad)" rx="12"/>

  <!-- Group 1: Title (0.3s) -->
  <g data-narration="Demand Paging is a memory management scheme where pages are loaded into physical memory only when they are actually needed by a running process." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="22" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Demand Paging</text>
    <text x="210" y="36" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#5C6BC0">Lazy Loading of Pages into Memory</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Group 2: Concept with page table (1.5s) -->
  <g data-narration="In demand paging, pages are loaded into memory ONLY when accessed. The page table tracks which pages are in memory with a valid bit. Valid bit 1 means the page is in a frame in memory. Valid bit 0 means the page is still on disk." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="54" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Pages loaded into memory ONLY when accessed</text>
    <!-- Page Table Header -->
    <rect x="20" y="62" width="175" height="16" fill="#3949AB" rx="3"/>
    <text x="32" y="73" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="white">Page#</text>
    <text x="82" y="73" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="white">Frame#</text>
    <text x="140" y="73" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="white">Valid</text>
    <!-- Page 0: in memory -->
    <rect x="20" y="78" width="175" height="14" fill="#E8EAF6" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="0.5" rx="2"/>
    <text x="40" y="88" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#3949AB" text-anchor="middle">0</text>
    <text x="98" y="88" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#2E7D32" text-anchor="middle">5</text>
    <text x="155" y="88" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="#2E7D32" text-anchor="middle">1</text>
    <!-- Page 1: on disk -->
    <rect x="20" y="92" width="175" height="14" fill="#FFF3E0" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.5" rx="2"/>
    <text x="40" y="102" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#3949AB" text-anchor="middle">1</text>
    <text x="98" y="102" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#C62828" text-anchor="middle">-</text>
    <text x="155" y="102" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828" text-anchor="middle">0</text>
    <!-- Page 2: in memory -->
    <rect x="20" y="106" width="175" height="14" fill="#E8EAF6" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="0.5" rx="2"/>
    <text x="40" y="116" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#3949AB" text-anchor="middle">2</text>
    <text x="98" y="116" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#2E7D32" text-anchor="middle">8</text>
    <text x="155" y="116" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="#2E7D32" text-anchor="middle">1</text>
    <!-- Page 3: on disk -->
    <rect x="20" y="120" width="175" height="14" fill="#FFF3E0" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.5" rx="2"/>
    <text x="40" y="130" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#3949AB" text-anchor="middle">3</text>
    <text x="98" y="130" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#C62828" text-anchor="middle">-</text>
    <text x="155" y="130" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828" text-anchor="middle">0</text>
    <!-- Page 4: in memory -->
    <rect x="20" y="134" width="175" height="14" fill="#E8EAF6" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="0.5" rx="2"/>
    <text x="40" y="144" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#3949AB" text-anchor="middle">4</text>
    <text x="98" y="144" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#2E7D32" text-anchor="middle">2</text>
    <text x="155" y="144" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="#2E7D32" text-anchor="middle">1</text>
    <!-- Legend -->
    <rect x="210" y="68" width="8" height="8" fill="#2E7D32" rx="1"/>
    <text x="222" y="75" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#2E7D32">Valid=1: In Memory</text>
    <rect x="210" y="82" width="8" height="8" fill="#C62828" rx="1"/>
    <text x="222" y="89" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">Valid=0: On Disk</text>
    <!-- Memory and Disk icons -->
    <rect x="310" y="100" width="45" height="24" fill="#3949AB" rx="4"/>
    <text x="332" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="white">RAM</text>
    <rect x="365" y="100" width="45" height="24" fill="#E65100" rx="4"/>
    <text x="387" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="white">Disk</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Group 3: Page Fault Handling Steps (3.0s) -->
  <g data-narration="When a page fault occurs, these 8 steps are followed: The CPU accesses a page, checks the page table, finds the page is not in memory (invalid), traps to the OS, the OS finds a free frame, loads the page from disk, updates the page table, and restarts the instruction." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#00695C">Page Fault Handling Steps</text>
    <!-- Step boxes in a flow layout -->
    <!-- Row 1: Steps 1-4 -->
    <rect x="10" y="172" width="93" height="22" fill="#00695C" rx="4"/>
    <text x="56" y="186" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="white">1. CPU accesses page</text>
    <text x="107" y="184" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#00695C">→</text>
    <rect x="113" y="172" width="93" height="22" fill="#00897B" rx="4"/>
    <text x="159" y="186" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="white">2. Check page table</text>
    <text x="210" y="184" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#00695C">→</text>
    <rect x="216" y="172" width="93" height="22" fill="#00695C" rx="4"/>
    <text x="262" y="186" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="white">3. Invalid (not in mem)</text>
    <text x="313" y="184" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#00695C">→</text>
    <rect x="319" y="172" width="93" height="22" fill="#00897B" rx="4"/>
    <text x="365" y="186" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="white">4. Trap to OS</text>
    <!-- Arrow down from step 4 to step 5 -->
    <line x1="365" y1="194" x2="365" y2="202" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <polygon points="362,200 365,206 368,200" fill="#00695C"/>
    <!-- Row 2: Steps 5-8 (reversed direction) -->
    <rect x="319" y="208" width="93" height="22" fill="#00695C" rx="4"/>
    <text x="365" y="222" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="white">5. Find free frame</text>
    <text x="313" y="220" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#00695C">←</text>
    <rect x="216" y="208" width="93" height="22" fill="#00897B" rx="4"/>
    <text x="262" y="222" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="white">6. Load from disk</text>
    <text x="210" y="220" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#00695C">←</text>
    <rect x="113" y="208" width="93" height="22" fill="#00695C" rx="4"/>
    <text x="159" y="222" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="white">7. Update page table</text>
    <text x="107" y="220" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#00695C">←</text>
    <rect x="10" y="208" width="93" height="22" fill="#00897B" rx="4"/>
    <text x="56" y="222" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="white">8. Restart instruction</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Group 4: Page Table Visualization (4.5s) -->
  <g data-narration="A page table entry contains a frame number and a valid bit. When valid equals 1, the page resides in a physical memory frame. When valid equals 0, the page is on disk and accessing it causes a page fault." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="248" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#E65100">Page Table Entry Format</text>
    <!-- Entry format boxes -->
    <rect x="60" y="255" width="140" height="20" fill="#E65100" rx="4"/>
    <text x="130" y="268" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="white">Frame Number</text>
    <rect x="200" y="255" width="70" height="20" fill="#BF360C" rx="4"/>
    <text x="235" y="268" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="white">Valid Bit</text>
    <rect x="280" y="255" width="80" height="20" fill="#D84315" rx="4"/>
    <text x="320" y="268" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="white">Protection</text>
    <!-- Example entries -->
    <rect x="60" y="280" width="140" height="14" fill="#FFF3E0" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.5" rx="2"/>
    <text x="130" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#E65100">Frame 5</text>
    <rect x="200" y="280" width="70" height="14" fill="#E8F5E9" stroke="#2E7D32" stroke-width="0.5" rx="2"/>
    <text x="235" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="#2E7D32">v = 1</text>
    <text x="370" y="290" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#2E7D32">In memory</text>
    <rect x="60" y="296" width="140" height="14" fill="#FFF3E0" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.5" rx="2"/>
    <text x="130" y="306" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#E65100">--</text>
    <rect x="200" y="296" width="70" height="14" fill="#FFEBEE" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.5" rx="2"/>
    <text x="235" y="306" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">v = 0</text>
    <text x="370" y="306" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">Page fault!</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Group 5: EAT Formula (6.0s) -->
  <g data-narration="Effective Access Time or EAT equals one minus p times memory access time plus p times page fault service time. With a page fault rate of 0.001, memory access of 200 nanoseconds, and page fault time of 8 milliseconds, the EAT is approximately 8.2 microseconds." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="6.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="326" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">Effective Access Time (EAT)</text>
    <rect x="30" y="332" width="360" height="20" fill="#FFEBEE" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.8" rx="4"/>
    <text x="210" y="345" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#C62828">EAT = (1 - p) x memory_access + p x page_fault_time</text>
    <rect x="30" y="356" width="360" height="18" fill="#FFF3E0" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="0.5" rx="3"/>
    <text x="210" y="368" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#E65100">p=0.001, mem=200ns, fault=8ms: EAT = 0.999x200 + 0.001x8,000,000 = 8,199.8ns</text>
    <text x="210" y="382" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">EAT ~ 8.2 microseconds (huge impact from even rare page faults!)</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Group 6: Benefits (7.5s) -->
  <g data-narration="Demand paging provides four key benefits: less I/O is needed since only required pages are loaded, less physical memory is needed, faster response time for starting processes, and the ability to support more concurrent processes." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="7.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <!-- Benefit pills -->
    <rect x="15" y="390" width="90" height="16" fill="#3949AB" rx="8"/>
    <text x="60" y="401" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="white">Less I/O needed</text>
    <rect x="115" y="390" width="95" height="16" fill="#00695C" rx="8"/>
    <text x="162" y="401" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="white">Less memory needed</text>
    <rect x="220" y="390" width="88" height="16" fill="#E65100" rx="8"/>
    <text x="264" y="401" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="white">Faster response</text>
    <rect x="318" y="390" width="90" height="16" fill="#C62828" rx="8"/>
    <text x="363" y="401" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="white">More processes</text>
  </g>
</svg>

nodes.label:
Find Free Frame
in Physical Memory

Load Page
from Disk to Frame
